overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a foggy, neon-lit elevated pedestrian walkway at night. The player passes palm trees and futuristic buildings with holographic advertisements, ascends a staircase, and enters a covered corridor with digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with color-changing neon canopy

events.description: canopy lights shift from yellow to red to purple
canopy lights shift to blue then green

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway beneath a color-changing neon canopy, passing palm trees and futuristic architecture

entered.detail: overhead structure with panels that cycle through yellow, red, purple, blue, and green neon colors
tall modern building with illuminated 'WILD BLUE' signage on the facade
tall palm trees lining the walkway, swaying slightly in the wind
yellow and black striped barriers blocking off a section of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player walks along an elevated pedestrian walkway at night, sheltered beneath a structure with color-changing neon lights that shift through various hues. To the right stands a tall building with 'WILD BLUE' signage, while palm trees line the path. The atmosphere is thick with fog, and the wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: staircase transition between walkway levels with large advertisement billboard

events.description: approaching staircase at end of walkway, large digital billboard becomes prominent
beginning ascent of wide staircase with orange railings

agents.ego_description: approaching and climbing a wide staircase to reach an upper level, passing a large digital billboard

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with orange side railings leading upward
large digital advertisement screen displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a wide staircase at the end of the walkway, with a large digital billboard visible on the right. The player then ascends the stairs, leaving the palm trees and Wild Blue building behind, while the colored canopy structure recedes into the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with digital advertisement walls

events.description: entering covered corridor from staircase, environment becomes fully enclosed
passing various holographic advertisements including CIRUS GOLD and ARASAKA

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor following an NPC who is also walking forward

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the player through the corridor, wearing casual clothing

entered.detail: enclosed walls of the upper pedestrian corridor with orange accents and vertical light strips
large illuminated screens displaying various advertisements and brand logos
large advertisement for CIRUS GOLD with red star logo
digital signage displaying ARASAKA corporate branding
illuminated sign for FOURTH WALL visible at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the player enters a fully enclosed pedestrian corridor lined with glowing digital advertisement panels. An NPC walks ahead in the same direction. The corridor features orange railings and displays various corporate advertisements including CIRUS GOLD and ARASAKA, with the foggy night sky no longer visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a foggy, neon-lit outdoor walkway into a sterile, enclosed corporate corridor. It begins by moving along a wet pedestrian path sheltered by a color-changing neon canopy, passing palm trees and a building marked with Wild Blue signage amidst a thick haze. As the camera approaches the end of the walkway, it ascends a wide staircase, leaving the open air and the vibrant canopy behind while passing a large digital billboard. The scene then shifts as the player reaches the top of the stairs and enters a fully enclosed corridor, where the foggy night sky is replaced by glowing digital advertisement panels for Cirus Gold and Arasaka. Finally, the camera follows an NPC deeper into this interior space, flanked by orange railings and a seamless wall of corporate displays.
